title: Overload
description: An expansion on Minecraft's art style to add more life to the game.
body:
An expansion on Minecraft's art style to add more life to the game. Overload is a massive Vanilla themed resource pack aimed towards smaller details, such as variated textures and models for everything you can find while playing.

**WARNING ABOUT MODS**

```
Many features in Overload require the use of mods to partially/fully function (Like connected textures.)
While these arent required for the entire pack to function, there might be some strange visual bugs that can happen without them.
OptiFine is an option for this, however I recommend Fabric alternatives to OptiFine which I have listed in the version download dependancies.
```


**TERMS OF USE**
```
You cannot use any of my original assets or resources for commercial use

You cannot use any of the assets or resources borrowed from others in this pack for commercial use without following their own terms.

You can redistribute my assets in your own resource pack as long I receive credit for it in a credits.txt file within the resource pack and on the page it is being hosted

You can use this resource pack within videos or live streams, however a link to my profile would be appreciated
```
Basically, follow the [CC-BY-NC-SA License](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/).
